# Overview

OAuth2 Extra Params Bad Connector is a synthetic connector used as a connectorgen validate
seeded-invalid case (oauth2_client_credentials auth.extra_params referencing an undeclared spec
key).

## Auth setup

OAuth2 client-credentials with an audience extra param.

## Streams notes

`widgets` is a single stream, no pagination.

## Write actions & risks

None.

## Known limits

None; this is test fixture data.
